R

readFromBinaryFile(String) - Static method in class utils.MyFileHandler
 
removeGreenActivity() - Method in class view.Controller
 
removeGreenActivity(GreenActivity) - Method in class model.Village
Remove a greenActivity from the GreenActivityList and CatalogueOfIdeas It also checks if the addedGreen activity is in the catalogueOfIdeas and removes it if it is
removeGreenActivity(GreenActivity) - Method in class model.VillageModelManager
Add a GreenActivity to the ArrayList of GreenActivities
removeGreenGoal() - Method in class view.Controller
 
removeGreenGoal(GreenGoal) - Method in class model.Village
Remove a GreenGoal from the goals
removeGreenGoal(GreenGoal) - Method in class model.VillageModelManager
removes a goal to the Village
removeSharedTask() - Method in class view.Controller
 
removeTrade(TradeOffer) - Method in class model.VillageModelManager
Removes a trade from the arraylist of trades present in the village
removeTradeOffer(TradeOffer) - Method in class model.Village
 
removeVillager() - Method in class view.Controller
 
removeVillager(Villager) - Method in class model.Village
removes villager (and it's associated trades through the removeTradesWithVillager() helper method) from village
removeVillager(Villager) - Method in class model.VillageModelManager
Removes a villager from the Village
resetnow() - Method in class model.Village
adds the villagers' personal points to the green pool (greenpoints) and sets the personal points to 0
resetNow() - Method in class model.VillageModelManager
Resets the personal points of all the villagers and transfers them in the community green pool calls Village.resetnow()
resetNow() - Method in class view.Controller
 
resetPerformers() - Method in class model.SharedTask
Resets the list of villagers who perform a shared task.
